evals.prompt: Migrate this MatrixScan code from BarcodeBatch to BarcodeAr. The visual feedback should be rectangle highlights on each tracked barcode (matching the existing Frame overlay style). File: MigrationSimpleSampleScreen.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, replaces all BarcodeBatch* symbols with BarcodeAr equivalents, replaces DataCaptureView with BarcodeArView created in initState() and stored as a field, wires a BarcodeArRectangleHighlight provider, removes the setMode call, preserves the scanResults list and camera lifecycle, and replaces _barcodeBatch.isEnabled assignments with _barcodeArView?.start()/_barcodeArView?.stop().

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSession is NOT present in the output file
scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeAr is present in the output file
BarcodeArView is present in the output file
BarcodeArRectangleHighlight is present in the output file
BarcodeArSettings is present in the output file
scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_ar is present in the output file
DataCaptureView is NOT present in the output file
addOverlay( is NOT present in the output file
setMode( is NOT present in the output file
isEnabled is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeArView is created in initState() and stored as a field, not constructed inside build() (semantic)
highlightForBarcode is present in the output file
The scanResults list and the logic that appends to it are preserved (semantic)
_camera!.switchToDesiredState( is preserved in the output — camera lifecycle is unchanged (semantic)
_barcodeArView?.stop() or _barcodeArView!.stop() replaces _barcodeBatch.isEnabled = false (semantic)
The import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_barcode_batch is gone and scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_ar is added (semantic)

evals.prompt: Migrate this MatrixScan code from BarcodeBatch to BarcodeAr. The bubbles above each barcode should become BarcodeAr annotations. Files: MigrationBubblesSampleScreen.dart and MigrationBubblesSampleProductBubble.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, replaces all BarcodeBatch* symbols with BarcodeAr equivalents, replaces DataCaptureView with BarcodeArView created in initState(), wires a BarcodeArAnnotationProvider that uses either BarcodeArCustomAnnotation (wrapping the ProductBubble widget) or BarcodeArInfoAnnotation, removes the manual viewQuadrilateralForFrameQuadrilateral distance heuristic and _updateView helper, removes the BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlay setup and all setWidgetForTrackedBarcode calls, migrates the lifecycle to _barcodeArView?.start()/_barcodeArView?.stop(), and converts ProductBubble from BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlayWidget to a plain StatefulWidget.

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlayWidget is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlayWidgetState is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlayContainer is NOT present in the output file
scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeArAnnotationProvider is present in the output file
BarcodeArView is present in the output file
scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_ar is present in the output file
at least one of BarcodeArCustomAnnotation or BarcodeArInfoAnnotation or BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation is present in the output file (semantic)
DataCaptureView is NOT present in the output file
addOverlay( is NOT present in the output file
setMode( is NOT present in the output file
setWidgetForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
viewQuadrilateralForFrameQuadrilateral is NOT present in the output file
_updateView is NOT present in the output file
anchorForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
offsetForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
isEnabled is NOT present in the output file
ProductBubble extends StatefulWidget in the migrated ProductBubble file — not BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlayWidget (semantic)
The bubble content (stock info and barcode data text) is preserved in the migrated ProductBubble or inside the annotation (semantic)
_barcodeArView?.stop() or equivalent replaces _barcodeBatch.isEnabled = false in the freeze and cleanup paths (semantic)
_camera?.switchToDesiredState( is preserved — camera lifecycle is unchanged (semantic)
